options.name: <DIEABSTRACTFILE>
options.description: name of the die abstract file

options.name: -check_only
options.description: This is only valid with the -no_diff option. If these two options are given, then the difference viewer will not be used, and the EDI db will not be updated

options.name: -no_diff
options.description: when given, the difference viewer will not be utilized. The die abstract will be read and the db updated with all the changes unless the -check_only option is provided.
